authorisation_basis: Gate 0 go (docs/adr/ADR-route-c-gate0-decision.md), accepted by the user on 2026-07-17
decision_note: go-to-plan-3 recorded per Plan 2 section 16; Plan 3 execution starts only after the user reviews and accepts this result, and requires its own separate spend preflight approval

items.item: repeated tiny runs produce matching logical checksums
profiles, versions, seed and scenario mix recorded
all events validate or enter expected quarantine
no uncontrolled wall-clock or random identity in generation
exact event, lifecycle, ledger and exception truth matches every scenario
engineering truth, analytical validation and illustrative magnitudes separated
no Monzo/customer-realism claim in generated manifests
standard data remains generated on demand, never committed
layer responsibilities mechanically inspectable
no presentation model is a second governed truth
consumers never query version-specific landing payloads
v1/v2 normalisation passes
same-batch replay is idempotent end to end
inside-lookback late events repair through ordinary incremental runs
beyond-lookback arrival demonstrated as missed, then recovered via bounded backfill
incremental and full-refresh interfaces reconcile with zero tolerance for keys and financial integers
debit equals credit for every journal
opening plus movements equals closing
injected missing/duplicate/reversal exceptions detected exactly
event-to-exception trace preserved; no general-ledger claim
owner, grain, unique key, freshness, classification, version and compatibility enforced on every governed model
standards checker fails deliberately invalid fixtures
consumer exposures declared
interface manifests align with dbt meta (manually reviewed; mechanical cross-check is an open item)
anchor consumer (Welch/SRM estimators behind the Experiments tab) runs entirely on governed interfaces
activation, referral, outcome and ML paths served through compatibility contracts
intentional semantic changes documented per compatibility relation
legacy graph still builds untouched alongside Route C (no deletions)
partition, clustering, adapter-aware incremental strategy and label configurations exist
BigQuery target parses statically (dummy project id, no auth, no execution)
no newly authorised paid cloud execution in Plan 2
no speed or cost percentage claimed anywhere
complete local suite passes from the current checkout via one command
CI pipeline covers generation determinism, loading, dbt build, standards, blue/green and pipeline tests with artifact upload
truth comparison and standards outputs retained as artifacts
failure artifacts identify the scenario and layer

open_items: standard profile (1M deliveries) is configured but not yet generated; first full generation plus runtime measurement happens at Plan 3 preflight, and the generator's per-event schema validation likely needs a validator cache before that run
interface manifest to dbt meta alignment is reviewed manually; a mechanical cross-check between contracts/interfaces/*.yml and model meta is deferred
compatibility relations run in parallel with the legacy relations; the name swap happens only after every consumer in the Task 5 map verifies (removal gate in compatibility.yml)
clean-checkout reproduction on a fresh machine is exercised by CI on push; Plan 4 additionally requires a clean-clone run
